_meta.purpose: Audit-driven reclassifications applied by build_frontier_map.py. Each entry corrects a vendored-CSV mathlib_area mis-tag: the corpus tagged many claims 'Mathlib.GroupTheory.OrderOfElement / Subgroup', which the classifier defaulted to status='tractable', even when the claim's actual content is a running-time complexity bound, a quantum (Shor/QFT) procedure, an index-calculus/Groebner step, a Weil pairing, an elliptic-net/EDS-period statement, or non-formalizable prose. These are status/foundation DEMOTIONS (and lateral moves) that the theorem-discharge overrides file intentionally does not carry. Applied after triage and before the verified/override paths, so a VERIFIED.md citation or a theorem-discharge override still wins.
_meta.provenance: Tractable-bucket over-optimism audit (2 independent strict skeptic agents over all 30 status='tractable' claims). 28 of 30 were mislabeled tractable purely from the lazy 'OrderOfElement / Subgroup' CSV area tag; each demotion re-derived from the claim's own statement content. 2 claims kept tractable (NOT listed here): glv-euclidean-basis-vector-015 (extended-Euclidean short kernel-lattice vector, pure number theory) and glv-frobenius-fast-example-004 (q-power Frobenius is a ring/curve endomorphism, elementary) — both genuinely formalizable now with no missing foundation. Informal-bucket audit (5 skeptic agents over all 238 status='informal' claims): 225 confirmed genuinely informal (reportage/empirical/scope/recommendation prose); 8 informal->blocked reclassifications recorded here (crisp truth-apt propositions that are foundation-gated, mislabeled as prose by conservative triage/heuristic): vow-shared-linear-speedup-003 & mm2017-pollard-limit-007 & cheng-huang-slp-definition-008 (cost_model), diem2013-success-probability-006 (semaev_polynomials), cheng-huang-height-decision-definition-003 (heights), lauter-stange-eds-problem-definitions-001 & stange-curve-net-poset-isomorphism-013 & stange-scale-equivalence-normalization-010 (elliptic_nets); the audit's 1 verified + 4 partial informal->discharge findings are recorded in corpus_coverage_overrides.json instead (they cite a theorem).
_meta.note: foundation=null means the claim is non-formalizable prose (informal): paper-scope reportage, empirical 'Assumption N states ...', or algorithm-design description.
